items.title: Fee Clarity and Reorder Release
items.description: Release focused on improving fee transparency, subscription benefit explanation, and repeat-order discovery for consumer ordering.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase consumer confidence before checkout by making discounts, delivery fees, service fees, tips, and membership benefits clear.
Increase conversion by reducing basket abandonment caused by price surprise.

businessKPIs.kpi: Monthly order frequency per active consumer
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat usage by improving value perception.

productBricks.change: Add more prominent reorder and everyday-mission entry modules.
Improve basket-level fee and promotion explanations.
Show membership savings more clearly before checkout.
Reduce checkout price-surprise abandonment.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated basket and checkout surfaces.
Release updated basket and checkout surfaces.

items.title: Merchant Prep and Dispatch Reliability Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing merchant wait time, improving prep-time estimates, and aligning dispatch with store readiness.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of orders ready when couriers arrive.
Reduce cancellations from stock, prep, or operational errors.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve order throughput and marketplace quality.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce wasted courier time at pickup.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve courier utilization and peak-zone reliability.

productBricks.change: Improve merchant prep-time updates and busy-mode controls.
Tune assignment timing using readiness and wait-time signals.
Improve ETA prediction using prep and pickup history.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated prep controls and operational diagnostics.

items.title: Merchant Ads and Insight Release
items.description: Release focused on better sponsored placement controls, merchant promotion reporting, and ads incrementality readouts.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve merchant ability to grow demand with measured ads and promotions.
Increase paid discovery adoption by improving campaign setup and reporting trust.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase marketplace revenue through ads, promotions, and order growth.

productBricks.change: Improve campaign setup, sponsored placement, and budget controls.
Improve merchant-funded offer targeting and readouts.
Add campaign, conversion, and profitability reporting.
Improve incrementality measurement for ads and promotions.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated ads manager and merchant insights.

items.title: Grocery Substitution and Catalog Reliability Release
items.description: Release focused on grocery and retail availability freshness, substitution preferences, weighted item handling, and partner inventory diagnostics.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase grocery and retail repeat use by reducing unavailable-item disappointment.
Reduce support friction for substitutions, missing items, and item refunds.

businessKPIs.kpi: Monthly order frequency per active consumer
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase everyday local commerce frequency beyond restaurant delivery.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve grocery and retail SKU accuracy for newly launched partners.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase successful orders from retail and grocery partners.

productBricks.change: Improve partner inventory and picker workflow integration.
Add stronger SKU availability and substitution data controls.
Add consumer substitution preference controls.
Improve item-level refund and substitution recovery.

deliveryChannels.change: Release retail catalog and inventory diagnostics.
Release inventory sync diagnostics and webhook updates.

items.title: Courier Earnings Transparency Release
items.description: Release focused on clearer courier offer cards, incentive progress, earnings breakdown, adjustments, and payout status.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase courier trust in base pay, tips, boosts, and adjustments.
Improve courier confidence that active delivery time produces understandable earnings.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase courier retention by reducing payout confusion and support escalations.

productBricks.change: Improve earnings breakdown and payout status explanations.
Improve incentive progress and eligibility visibility.
Add more consistent offer estimate fields.
Improve payout posting and adjustment explanation.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated offer, earnings, and payout screens.
Release supporting pay calculation and ledger event changes.

items.title: Trust and Refund Controls Release
items.description: Release focused on faster legitimate issue recovery, better refund abuse controls, and clearer merchant dispute paths.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve fair issue recovery without forcing unnecessary agent escalation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce preventable refund and promotion leakage.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce unfair merchant refund disputes and improve policy clarity.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve merchant trust in the marketplace.

productBricks.change: Tune refund, promo, and account risk decisions.
Improve issue classification and self-service policy explanations.
Improve refund, credit, and reversal postings.
Add trust operations monitoring views.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated issue reporting and resolution flows.
Release merchant dispute and policy views.
Release risk and ledger policy changes.

items.title: Marketplace Metric Layer Release
items.description: Release focused on standard GMV, order, active user, defect, courier utilization, ads, and contribution margin definitions across planning and operations.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve decision quality by aligning funnel, reliability, and margin guardrails.

businessKPIs.kpi: Monthly order frequency per active consumer
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve growth experiments with better retention and frequency measurement.

productBricks.change: Publish governed marketplace metric definitions.
Add experiment guardrails for conversion, reliability, and margin.
Align merchant reports to standard order and revenue definitions.
Add marketplace health scorecards for city operations.

deliveryChannels.change: Release metric events and semantic layer updates.
